title: Legion Community Guardian Manifest
description: Schema for guardian.json in a Legion community guardian package.

name.description: Package name: lowercase-kebab, no spaces. Must be globally unique in the registry.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name shown in the VS Code QuickPick.

description.description: Short description (≤ 120 chars) shown in the QuickPick detail line.

minLegionVersion.description: Minimum Legion VS Code extension version required.

agentFile.description: Relative path to the guardian agent prompt (typically 'agent.md').

skillFiles.description: Relative paths to skill weapon files (under skills/).

author.description: Author display name or GitHub handle.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (must be OSI-approved, e.g. 'MIT', 'Apache-2.0').

pinned.description: If true, this guardian is excluded from auto-update checks.
